title: For Release                                                                        Contact: Maria L. Lopez: 916-712-9854 (Cell)
prompt_preview:
[1 chunks] Task: Extract all distinct claims about AI or emerging technology in this press release. Do NOT assume a fixed number.
Output JSON only matching the provided schema.
Return concise, standalone claim_texts that could be tested against scientific literature. Exclude purely procedural statem

claims.claim_text: The 2014 state proposition that changed sentencing in California needs attention.
There is a problem with repeat offenders in San Bernardino and Riverside Counties.
The State Auditor’s report underscores the urgency of addressing repeat offenders with four or more convictions.
Rehabilitative programs have been proven to reduce recidivism.
Improving how the Legislature deals with criminal classification and sentencing is necessary.
